definitions.chart_cold: new Chromium context with empty browser and HTTP cache; timer starts at selecting the cached symbol and ends at ECharts finished plus hover/zoom/drag/crosshair proof
definitions.chart_warm: same Chromium and service processes after one unmeasured completed render; timer captures the prior generation and requires a strictly newer finished ECharts generation before the chart_cold interaction boundary
definitions.formula_cache_cold: one distinct pre-seeded immutable formula version per sample; timer starts at preview action and ends at ECharts finished with main/subchart/BUY/SELL visible
definitions.pool_ui: 20 raw windows from one worker-backed pool task: 18 rendered/API-matched progress windows with at least two distinct states, one SPA navigation window, and one actual cancellation window
definitions.single_backtest_fresh: new submitted task per sample; timer starts at POST submit and ends after worker-persisted report is visible
